Macros for runtime assertions, memory allocation functions, mutex structures, and tick conversion functions.


## Files
- **[assert.h](assert.h.md)**: Defines macros for runtime assertions with optional link register information.
- **[malloc.h](malloc.h.md)**: Memory allocation and deallocation functions for the Pebble firmware.
- **[mutex.h](mutex.h.md)**: Defines mutex and recursive mutex structures and functions for creation, locking, unlocking, and ownership checks.
- **[tick.h](tick.h.md)**: Functions for converting between milliseconds and ticks.
